---
title: "Prior Sensitivity Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(
#   echo       = FALSE,   # hide code in paper output
#   warning    = FALSE,
#   message    = FALSE,
#   fig.width  = 7,
#   fig.height = 4.5,
#   fig.retina = 3,       # crisp figures on retina displays
#   dpi        = 300      # print-quality
# )
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# Prior Sensitivity Analysis: Personalized Pre-Session Preparation
# N-of-1 Crossover Trial | Maya Care and Grow, Agartala
# PI: Martin Braquet | Collaborator: Riki Dewan
# =============================================================================
#
# STRUCTURE
#   0.  Packages & parallel backend
#   1.  Analysis
#   2.  Reporting
#
# =============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(brms)
library(MASS)
library(furrr)
library(cmdstanr)
library(scales)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "model.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "sim.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "plotting.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "power.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "stop_criteria.R"))
source(here::here("analysis", "utils", "sensitivity.R"))

set.seed(42)
```

```{r}
n_sims  <- 14

effect_size   <- 2.0
n_children   <- 25
max_sessions <- 48

run_prior_sensitivity(
  n_sims = n_sims,
  effect_size = effect_size,
  n_children = n_children,
  max_sessions = max_sessions
)
```
